schema.description: Provides read and write access to Slack conversations, channels, and messages, including search and threaded replies.

tools.name: channels_list
tools.description: List Slack conversations such as public channels, private channels, DMs, and group DMs.

limit.description: Maximum number of channels to return (default 100).

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response.

id.description: The unique identifier of the channel.

name.description: The display name of the channel.

is_channel.description: True if the conversation is a channel.

is_private.description: True if the conversation is private.

is_im.description: True if the conversation is a direct message.

num_members.description: Number of members in the channel.

next_cursor.description: Cursor for the next page of results.

tools.name: conversations_history
tools.description: Fetch messages from a Slack channel, DM, or group DM.

channel_id.description: Channel ID or name such as "C1234567890" or "#general".

limit.description: Time window or message count such as "1d", "30d", "90d", or "50".

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response.

include_activity_messages.description: Include channel join/leave and other activity messages.

user.description: The unique identifier of the user who sent the message.

text.description: The text content of the message.

thread_ts.description: The timestamp of the parent message if this is a reply.

next_cursor.description: Cursor for the next page of results.

tools.name: conversations_replies
tools.description: Fetch replies in a Slack message thread.

channel_id.description: Channel ID or name containing the thread.

thread_ts.description: Timestamp of the parent message or a message in the thread.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response.

messages.description: List of message objects in the thread.

next_cursor.description: Cursor for the next page of results.

thread_ts.description: The timestamp of the parent message in the thread.

tools.name: conversations_search_messages
tools.description: Search Slack messages across channels, DMs, and threads.

search_query.description: Text query or Slack message URL.

filter_in_channel.description: Channel ID or name to restrict the search.

filter_users_from.description: User ID or display name of message sender.

filter_date_after.description: Earliest message date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

filter_date_before.description: Latest message date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

filter_threads_only.description: Return only messages that are part of threads.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response.

next_cursor.description: Cursor for the next page of results.

tools.name: conversations_add_message
tools.description: Add a message to a Slack channel, DM, or thread.

channel_id.description: Channel ID or name where the message should be posted.

content_type.description: Payload content type such as "text/markdown" or "text/plain".

ok.description: True if the message was posted successfully.

channel.description: The unique identifier of the channel where the message was posted.

ts.description: The timestamp of the posted message.

message.description: The full message object that was posted.

scenarios.description: Single public channel with one message - tests basic channel and message retrieval
Multiple channels including a DM and private channel, messages with reactions and a thread
